news.headline: Fed Signals Unexpected 50bps Rate Hike in Upcoming Session
news.description: Fearing sticky service-sector inflation, the Federal Reserve hinted at a surprise 50 basis point increase in the federal funds rate, causing bond yields to spike and equity futures to tumble.

news.headline: Straits of Hormuz Blockade Triggers Supply Chain Panic
news.description: Geopolitical escalation has led to a complete naval blockade in the Straits of Hormuz. Crude oil prices jumped 14% intraday, raising global concerns about supply chain disruptions and input cost inflation.

news.headline: Major Mid-Sized Regional Bank Reports High Deposit Outflows
news.description: Rumors spreading on social media platforms have triggered a coordinated digital run on a prominent regional bank, with depositors withdrawing over $12B in a single morning, testing local liquidity backstops.

news.headline: Zero-Day Exploit Targets Major SWIFT Node, Halting European Clearing
news.description: A sophisticated state-sponsored cyber-attack has disrupted a critical European transaction clearing hub, temporarily delaying billions in cross-border settlements and triggering emergency operational protocols.

news.headline: Tech Stocks Rally on Breakthrough in Superconductor Manufacturing
news.description: Researchers have validated a room-temperature ambient pressure superconductor breakthrough, fueling a massive risk-on surge in major hardware and technology shares.
